summary: Implemented `agt report <feature>` command that reads STATE.json and prints a 5-section execution report (header, task summary table, activity/gate counts, blocked/failed tasks, recommendations) to stdout. Added `--output md` flag to write REPORT.md to the feature directory. Registered the command in bin/agt.mjs with help text, and wrote 16 tests covering all paths including missing args, missing dir, missing STATE.json, stdout output, md output, blocked task display, and stalled-feature detection.
